params.name: Cancer
params.description:
As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:

When luck comes, like a force untold, Irresistible, bold, as precious as gold.
params.ss1:

W-tads collected from Drill Rig +10%
Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop HP +1,600
Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +160
